prompt: Create a horizontal 16:9 hand-drawn wedding invitation illustration in a soft Korean/Japanese watercolor children’s-book style. Use a warm terracotta-red rounded rectangle background with rough dry-brush edges on a white canvas, subtle paper grain, tiny white sparkles and floating hearts. On the left half, draw exactly 2 cute chibi-style wedding characters: 1 groom and 1 bride. The groom has dark brown softly tousled hair, a black suit jacket, white shirt, rust-red tie, gentle dot eyes, rosy cheeks, and a small boutonniere. The bride has dark brown hair in a soft updo, a delicate flower crown, sheer veil, off-shoulder white wedding dress with translucent sleeves, dot eyes, rosy cheeks, and holds a bouquet of coral, peach, cream, and green flowers tied with a red ribbon. Include exactly 4 main floral decorations: the groom’s boutonniere, the bride’s bouquet, a lower-left floral sprig near the couple, and a right-side floral cluster with a large pale rose and small blossoms. Add a delicate decorative wedding name frame on the right half: thin white ornamental lines forming a loose rounded rectangle, a small heart at the top center, a bow flourish at the bottom center, and two blank name lines separated by an ampersand, reading “______ & ______”. Add exactly 1 decorative bow motif in the upper-left corner made from thin white lines and dotted floral ornaments. Keep the composition airy and romantic, with muted pastel colors, soft pencil outlines, watercolor blush shading, no photorealism, no harsh shadows, no extra people, and no watermark.
promptEn: Create a horizontal 16:9 hand-drawn wedding invitation illustration in a soft Korean/Japanese watercolor children’s-book style. Use a warm terracotta-red rounded rectangle background with rough dry-brush edges on a white canvas, subtle paper grain, tiny white sparkles and floating hearts. On the left half, draw exactly 2 cute chibi-style wedding characters: 1 groom and 1 bride. The groom has dark brown softly tousled hair, a black suit jacket, white shirt, rust-red tie, gentle dot eyes, rosy cheeks, and a small boutonniere. The bride has dark brown hair in a soft updo, a delicate flower crown, sheer veil, off-shoulder white wedding dress with translucent sleeves, dot eyes, rosy cheeks, and holds a bouquet of coral, peach, cream, and green flowers tied with a red ribbon. Include exactly 4 main floral decorations: the groom’s boutonniere, the bride’s bouquet, a lower-left floral sprig near the couple, and a right-side floral cluster with a large pale rose and small blossoms. Add a delicate decorative wedding name frame on the right half: thin white ornamental lines forming a loose rounded rectangle, a small heart at the top center, a bow flourish at the bottom center, and two blank name lines separated by an ampersand, reading “______ & ______”. Add exactly 1 decorative bow motif in the upper-left corner made from thin white lines and dotted floral ornaments. Keep the composition airy and romantic, with muted pastel colors, soft pencil outlines, watercolor blush shading, no photorealism, no harsh shadows, no extra people, and no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张 16:9 横向的手绘婚礼邀请函插画，采用柔和的韩式/日式水彩绘本风格。使用温暖的赤陶红圆角矩形作为背景，在白色画布上呈现粗糙的干笔触边缘，带有细微的纸张纹理、微小的白色闪光和漂浮的心形图案。在左半部分，精确绘制 2 个可爱的 Q 版婚礼角色：1 位新郎和 1 位新娘。新郎拥有 深棕色 的蓬松短发，身穿黑色西装外套、白色衬衫，系着铁锈红领带，有着柔和的豆豆眼、红润的脸颊和一枚小巧的胸花。新娘拥有 深棕色 的柔和盘发，戴着精致的花冠和透明头纱，身穿露肩白色婚纱，袖子呈半透明状，有着豆豆眼、红润的脸颊，手中拿着一束由珊瑚色、桃色、奶油色和绿色花朵组成并系着红丝带的花束。包含 4 处主要花卉装饰：新郎的胸花、新娘的手捧花、新人附近左下角的花枝，以及右侧由一朵大淡粉色玫瑰和小花组成的花簇。在右半部分添加一个精致的装饰性婚礼姓名框：由纤细的白色装饰线条构成一个宽松的圆角矩形，顶部中心有一个小心形，底部中心有一个蝴蝶结装饰，中间有两条由“&”符号分隔的空白姓名横线，显示为“______ & ______”。在左上角添加 1 个由纤细白线和点状花卉装饰组成的蝴蝶结图案。保持构图空灵浪漫，采用柔和的粉彩色调，使用柔和的铅笔轮廓和水彩腮红阴影，拒绝写实风格，避免强烈的阴影，不要出现多余人物，且无水印。
